title: Japanese Offering Shrines
description: Discover forgotten traditional japanese shrines in a Minecraft vanilla-friendly style, wich can be found in two different variations in forests and cherry grove biomes.
body:
![Cherryo Blossom Shrine](https://i.imgur.com/G4XYxTQ.jpeg)

Step into the past and explore the enigmatic world of **forgotten offering shrines** with the **Japanese Offering Shrines Mod!** This mod introduces realistically generated shrines ruins into Minecraft, appearing in **cherry groves and forests.** Each shrine captures the mysterious aura of the real-world monument, making your world feel alive with history and ancient secrets.

![Forest Shrine](https://i.imgur.com/QzgXmpX.jpeg)

Perfect for players who enjoy **exploration, world-building, and discovering landmarks with cultural and historical inspiration**, these shrines serve as unique points of interest to enrich your Minecraft adventures.

![Forest Shrine](https://i.imgur.com/r5KkMgH.jpeg)

Whether you're a **solo explorer or part of a multiplayer server**, these shrines bring **atmospheric depth, realism, and storytelling potential** to your world.
